title: Reaper Enchantment
description: Adds a new combat enchantment for the hoe.
body:
## Minecraft Hoes
Hoes have this really cool feature in minecraft where they have a really high attack speed. Unfortunately this is utterly useless in combat because they do no damage.

## What this datapack offers
This datapack aims to fix this problem by adding a new enchantment, Reaping. Reaping has 5 levels each one increases damage by 1 for hoes. A netherite hoe can do up to 9 damage now,  or 36 dps, however do to immunity ticks you will prolly only get 18 dps.

### Logo
Thank you to Pyrrhuloxia for making the plugin logo!
